attributes.content:
## Overview

The Mockup card gives the workspace a structured home for design mockup with image, annotations, version history, and feedback thread.

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

Mockup usually evolves through drafting, review, and reuse. The card keeps its core content structured enough to be surfaced in different views, linked from related records, and updated by people or automation without losing provenance.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[AI Image]]** -- Mockup can incorporate generated visuals or treat image output as a linked asset.
- **[[Prompt Template]]** -- Prompt-driven drafting or summarization can turn Mockup into a reusable AI-assisted workflow.
- **[[Project]]** -- Mockup can be grouped under a larger initiative so its work stays visible in context.
- **[[Task]]** -- Mockup often creates follow-up work or is itself tracked through task execution.
- **[[Document]]** -- Mockup can link to longer-form supporting content when a lightweight card needs deeper context.
- **[[Brand Guide]]** -- Brand Guide can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Mockup.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create Mockup as the structured home for design mockup with image, annotations, version history, and feedback thread and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates Mockup when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** Mockup stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.
